<h2 class="section-title">Dumka and Nearby</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Dainik Bhaskar:</strong> सरैयाहाट में दोहरे हत्याकांड से हड़कंप, आरोपी पिता गिरफ्तार - Dainik Bhaskar<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">L1</a></span></li>

<h2 class="section-title">Jharkhand</h2>

  <li><strong>Jagran:</strong> उत्पाद सिपाही भर्ती में 62 अभ्यर्थी मेडिकल में असफल, अपील का मौका; क्षेत्रीय कार्यकर्ता परीक्षा में 26.77 ही उपस्थिति - 62 fail jharkhand excise constable medical exam appeal info - Jagran<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxNb1dGZktmY2ZXRDRFWFBTSkw2UmFwakJYNVQwVnVWejJpQW9xcGpUTjRFMHVJckNqR2ZodmpOTlpsRUdhYzBjWFdrbUxOWGc0YjdMSGcyQUJDc3NjRXVERE5fNGpybHQ0S1kyaG91ZlJlaDBrRS0wdGE4Ty1yUWlYOHIyMjhQNlRmQUhmMmwtQ1NQUmgzaHhlRUFRYjZCcjZjQWJ4UmdxUXJMb2J5Y01GRVJQOA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">J1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMibkFVX3lxTFByamlBSUtyNDZ5S1pkLVNjaEVDRC10RXpnQnFuX1VoYkI4aGN1ZmRlQy1pQUFFQjY3Tms1c3F1bWQyRU1LNGxETk0zRVlYTC1jV1lBSGdyOXZkcGtvdUNqX2NydzEteE1iLTdqYUJ3?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">J2</a></span></li>
